abort.already_configured: This Delhaize account is already configured
abort.mfa_session_expired: The Delhaize MFA setup session expired
abort.wrong_account: The provided Delhaize account does not match this config entry

error.captcha_required: Delhaize requires a captcha. Use a Cookie header from an already logged-in browser session.
error.login_failed: Login failed. Check the credentials or Cookie header.
error.mfa_required: Delhaize requires multi-factor authentication but did not return a usable MFA token.
error.missing_auth: Provide either a Cookie header or both username and password.

mfa.description: Enter the temporary Delhaize code sent to {otp_target}.
mfa.title: Delhaize verification

user.description: Use your Delhaize credentials. If Delhaize sends a temporary code by email, Home Assistant will ask for it in the next step. A Cookie header is only needed as a fallback when Delhaize requires captcha.
user.title: Set up Delhaize

entry_id.description: Optional Delhaize config entry id. Leave empty to activate offers for all accounts.
entry_id.name: Config entry
